expectations.evidence: Enumerated 8 capability-scoped ADRs with titles + one-liners.
Each ADR item ties to specific TR-NNs (TR-01, TR-03, TR-05, etc.).
Response explicitly omits storage vendor / compute platform / telemetry backend choices — left to define-adr.
Closes with explicit 'Approved as-is / Approved with changes / Pause' menu and 'Until you approve, no issues are filed.'
gh-invocations.txt contains '# DO NOT execute until the user approves'; no actual filing simulated.
